
#### 👔 employment {style="text-align:center;"}

::: {#tbl-experience}
| position                                                                           |               @                                                    | start | end  |
|:---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |:------------------------------------------------------------------:|:-----:|:----:|
| software development engineering intern                                            | [Amazon Web Services](https://aws.amazon.com/)                     |  2026 |  --  |
| systems operations engineer                                                        | [Tandemn](https://www.tandemn.com/)                                |  2025 |  --  |
| SPIN intern                                                                        | [NCSA](https://ncsa.illinois.edu/)                                 |  2025 | 2025 |
| software engineering intern                                                        | [ANB Systems](https://www.anbsystems.com/)                         |  2024 | 2024 |
| CELS research intern                                                               | [ANL](https://www.anl.gov/)                                        |  2022 | 2024 |

:  💻 work {.responsive .striped .hover}
:::

#### 🍎 school {style="text-align:center;"}

::: {#tbl-education}

|            degree                     |                               in                                                             |               @                    | end  |
|:------------------------------------- |:--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------:|:----------------------------------:|:----:|
| B.Sc (James Scholar)                   |  [Computer Science](https://grainger.illinois.edu/academics/undergraduate/majors-and-minors/computer-science)  |      [UIUC](https://illinois.edu/) | 2028 |


: 🎓 education {.responsive .striped .hover}
:::
